message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
autonumber

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Service Provider" as ServiceProvider
participant "Authorization Provider" as AuthorizationProvider

activate Client
activate AuthorizationProvider

Client -> AuthorizationProvider : POST /register
AuthorizationProvider --> Client : 201 Created

Client -> AuthorizationProvider : POST /token
AuthorizationProvider --> Client : 200 OK

deactivate Client
deactivate AuthorizationProvider

@enduml
```
